hero.tagline: Where Children Observe, Think, and Create
hero.sub: A global creative education brand for ages 3-7
hero.quote: Children observe real objects, build their own ideas, and express them through drawing and making.

whatIsNoljak.headline: Creative education for young children, starting with thinking observation — from Korea, it's Noljak!
whatIsNoljak.card1Desc: A creative education brand born in Korea, now growing globally.
whatIsNoljak.card2Desc: Designed for young children from age 3 through early elementary.
whatIsNoljak.card3Desc: Art is the medium. Thinking and creating is the goal.
whatIsNoljak.supportingMessage: Noljak nurtures the creativity of children in 11 countries worldwide through a systematic curriculum grounded in a clear educational philosophy.

programs.crekicHeadline: Where learning begins with the whole body.
programs.crekicDesc: Children grow through sensory play, emotional expression, and performance-based art activities.
programs.basicDesc: Children observe real objects, build their own ideas, and express them through drawing and making.
programs.creatorDesc: Children expand their thinking through multi-layered projects and present their own original creative works.

nowNoljak.title: Now Noljak
nowNoljak.subtitle: See Noljak happening around the world.
nowNoljak.description: From Korea to Global and beyond, discover real classroom moments of observation, thinking, and creative expression.

findCenter.title: Find Noljak near you.
findCenter.cta: Global Business — Bring Noljak to Your City
